categories.title: Communication
categories.description: Convey information clearly and effectively using written, verbal, and non-verbal communication.

subskills.title: Terminology, Spelling and Grammar
subskills.description: Use appropriate terminology, spelling, and grammar to communicate clearly.

subskills.title: Purpose, Audience and Format
subskills.description: Choose the right message, structure, and format for the intended audience and purpose.

subskills.title: Non-verbal Communication
subskills.description: Use body language, facial expression, and tone to support meaning and connection.

subskills.title: Active Listening
subskills.description: Listen with focus, ask questions, and respond thoughtfully.

categories.title: Digital Literacy
categories.description: Use digital tools safely, effectively, and responsibly for research, communication, and work.

subskills.title: Reliable Online Research
subskills.description: Locate trustworthy information and assess source reliability.

subskills.title: Online Safety
subskills.description: Use online safety processes to reduce risk and protect digital identity.

subskills.title: Electronic Communication
subskills.description: Communicate effectively using email, text, video calls, and related media.

subskills.title: Work-related Software
subskills.description: Use documents, presentations, spreadsheets, and multimedia tools in work contexts.

categories.title: Teamwork
categories.description: Work effectively with others by contributing reliably and building strong working relationships.

subskills.title: Build Rapport
subskills.description: Develop positive relationships and trust with team members.

subskills.title: Team Roles and Responsibilities
subskills.description: Perform agreed team roles and meet responsibilities.

subskills.title: Reliability and Task Completion
subskills.description: Complete tasks on time and to the expected standard.

subskills.title: Consensus Building
subskills.description: Consider other viewpoints and work toward shared decisions.

categories.title: Time Management
categories.description: Plan, prioritise, and adapt time and tasks to meet deadlines effectively.

subskills.title: Plan and Prioritise
subskills.description: Organise tasks and priorities to meet deadlines.

subskills.title: Productivity Tools
subskills.description: Use planning and productivity tools to manage tasks and workflow.

subskills.title: Track and Reassess
subskills.description: Monitor progress and adjust priorities when circumstances change.

categories.title: Critical Thinking
categories.description: Use evidence, analysis, and reflection to make informed judgments and decisions.

subskills.title: Research and Information Gathering
subskills.description: Collect reliable information relevant to a task.

subskills.title: Analysis and Evaluation
subskills.description: Compare, analyse, and evaluate information to develop a solution.

subskills.title: Bias Reflection
subskills.description: Recognise and reflect on bias that may affect decisions.

categories.title: Problem-Solving
categories.description: Identify issues, generate options, and apply structured decision-making to resolve problems.

subskills.title: Questioning Techniques
subskills.description: Use open and closed questions to understand situations and issues.

subskills.title: Generate Solutions
subskills.description: Develop a range of possible solutions.

subskills.title: Decision-making Models
subskills.description: Use a decision-making model to plan, implement, and evaluate solutions.
